stemHtml: Aircraft engines equipped with FADEC have redundancy built in with regards to data input and control output. This is to ensure...

options.a: that engine parameters displays are not lost should one channel fail.
options.b: uninterrupted engine operation if one channel fails.
options.c: that analogue signals can be converted to digital data even if a single FADEC channel fails.
options.d: the engine parameter recording for post-flight maintenance purposes.
